entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer providing multi-level retention for users, sessions, and autonomous agents. It utilizes hybrid retrieval and temporal reasoning to rank memories by relevant dates and states.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An open-source context database that uses a filesystem-based directory paradigm and tiered L0/L1/L2 loading. This approach significantly reduces token usage while improving task-completion rates via recursive directory retrieval.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: A high-performance memory engine featuring sub-300ms recall and byte-level deduplication for prompt-cache discounts. It automates user profile maintenance and includes native connectors for Notion, GitHub, and Google Drive.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated brain for Hermes Agent that synthesizes cited answers with explicit gap analysis of missing information. It features a self-wiring knowledge graph for complex entity traversal and MCP support for tools like Cursor and Claude Code.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system implementing retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term knowledge. It offers a simple LLM wrapper for automatic storage and supports enterprise backends like PostgreSQL and Oracle AI Database.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: A memory provider that treats context as a git repository, allowing for branching, merging, and versioning of markdown context trees. It delivers sub-100ms retrieval across a 5-tier system and includes built-in tools for code execution.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A stateful agent library that extracts reasoning-based conclusions rather than relying on simple vector matching. It maintains evolving representations of users and projects in prompt-ready formats compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving context harness that uses five specialized agent roles to generate structured playbooks. It enables persistent knowledge transfer through CLI-first skill exports for Hermes Agent.
entries.AxDSan/mnemosyne: A zero-dependency, SQLite-backed memory system delivering sub-millisecond performance. It combines vector similarity, FTS5, and importance scoring in an MCP-ready integration.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin utilizing a hierarchical summary DAG for depth-aware compaction. It preserves raw messages in SQLite and provides dedicated tools like lcm_grep for precise retrieval.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for Honcho that enables private, cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers and any OpenAI-compatible LLM via a Docker-based setup.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: A local-first context engine that operates without API keys or cloud dependencies. It employs a hybrid retrieval system combining BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A portable identity and memory layer that ensures state continuity across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and OpenClaw. It uses SQLite and markdown for local data ownership and hybrid graph-vector retrieval.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer for multi-agent systems using an open YAML engram format. It implements ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts and decay stale information without API costs.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases cache hits and reduces prefill latency through prefix reordering and deduplication. It is designed to accelerate inference across SGLang, vLLM, and the Hermes ecosystem.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It leverages SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to provide bounded evidence packing that reduces prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system featuring semantic search and ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories and URLs, using edge tags to create navigable relationships with inverse links.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It tracks contradictions and handles canonicalization without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses a local-first SQLite-vec storage and an MCP-native server for seamless integration with coding agents.
entries.alias8818/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces prompt overhead by using BM25-based ranking to select only the most relevant tool schemas. It includes a dashboard to monitor token savings across hybrid and Anthropic Tool Search modes.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using a columnar .lbdb embedded graph database. It employs importance-weighted recall to surface high-priority memories and supports GLiNER2 for entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of memories without leaving persistent summaries. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log to track every memory operation for transparency.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first design and prototyping system that integrates directly with Hermes Agent and 15 other coding-agent CLIs. It provides 137 composable skills and 150 design systems with support for multiple export formats including HTML, PDF, and PPTX.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A library of 754 structured cybersecurity skills mapped to major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. It follows the agentskills.io standard to enable sub-second discovery and execution across 26 security domains.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: Enables the generation of .drawio XML diagrams from natural language descriptions with six specialized presets for architecture, UML, and deep learning. It utilizes visual feedback loops to self-check and automatically fix layout issues.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: An auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns through rewrite, detect, and edit-in-place modes. It uses a 109-entry word replacement table and 47 pattern categories to ensure content compatibility with Hermes and other AI editors.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across different agents and teams while integrating natively with Hermes and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform library offering modular frameworks for UX design, architecture, marketing, and product strategy. These skills are compatible with Claude Code and agentskills.io-compatible agents via a marketplace or npx CLI.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically detect and propose reusable skills. It generates Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation, manageable via dedicated slash commands.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe agentskills.io support for Pydantic AI, utilizing progressive disclosure to reduce token consumption. It supports both programmatic Python definitions and filesystem-based skill loading.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: A suite of tools for extracting transcripts, captions, and timestamps from YouTube without relying on yt-dlp. It enables Hermes Agent and other compatible tools to perform video searches, channel browsing, and playlist extraction.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and one-click installation of skills, featuring automated security scanning with over 65 threat detection rules. It includes a creator marketplace with crypto/Stripe payments and an agent-to-agent trust scoring system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: Teaches Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions for complex problem solving. It identifies structural conservation laws in codebases and generates constraint reports to highlight analysis blind spots.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents that manages shared state locally in .maestro/ without needing a database. It decomposes complex specifications into execution plans and uses JSON handoff envelopes for seamless cross-session transitions.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming skill that weaves prose, diagrams, and source code into .lit.md files. It includes a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the original literate document.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: Implements cross-instance shared memory via markdown-based fabric directories to help agents remember previous work. It features an end-to-end pipeline for extracting training data and fine-tuning replacement models.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A pre-build workflow that transforms rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Standardized skills for interacting with the Chainlink oracle network, including CCIP, Data Feeds, and VRF. It supports local simulations and CRE onboarding, compatible with Vercel's open skills ecosystem CLI.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant instructions. It ensures traceability by linking instructions to specific source file line numbers and uses version-pinning to prevent instruction rot.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: The official skill set for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2 image generation, providing standardized prompting guidelines and API integration patterns. It supports JSON structured prompting and precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry for reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification, featuring an OpenAPI-driven Python SDK and CLI. It supports recursive dependency resolution and monetization via Stripe and the TON blockchain.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Provides autonomous execution for long-running, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes built-in rollback procedures to ensure safe recovery during complex task execution.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses a three-layer lazy loading architecture to reduce token usage by up to 86%. It employs a socket-based daemon for persistent connections and supports hot-reloading configurations.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: Integrates Hermes Agent with Nextcloud to manage files, notes, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It ensures secure communication over HTTPS using Nextcloud App Passwords and includes a guided setup script.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C# / .NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It utilizes SKILL.md files for progressive disclosure and integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool-based skill loading.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: This project provides a suite of Nix packages for AI coding agents, including Hermes, that benefit from daily automatic updates. It offers a unified proxy API for multiple model providers, ensuring a consistent and reproducible environment for developers using diverse orchestrators.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: ClawPhone enables native deployment of the Antigravity CLI on ARM64 Android devices via Termux, bypassing heavy compatibility layers. It includes hardware integration support through Termux extensions, allowing Hermes to interact directly with smartphone APIs and GUI elements.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: Designed for Windows users, this zero-install desktop agent comes pre-configured with 100 built-in tools and local model support via LM Studio. It features a dynamic tool maker and workflow engine, providing a portable automation pipeline without the need for Docker or complex setup.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: This community Helm chart facilitates cloud-native Hermes deployments on Kubernetes with a focus on state safety for persistent storage. It supports both direct deployments and operator-ready workflows, offering a configurable gateway mode for API and webhook listeners.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: This repository provides a one-line automated installer for running Hermes Agent within Termux on Android devices. It specifically enables local model execution via Ollama and supports persistent memory, making it ideal for mobile-first agent interactions.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: Hermesclaw focuses on high-security environments by implementing hardware-enforced sandboxing through NVIDIA OpenShell and kernel-level syscall blocking. It offers three distinct security policy presets and a pre-built library of specialized skills for research and code reviews.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: This project offers a streamlined Docker sandbox that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It simplifies deployment by supporting persistent state through mounted directories and allowing users to build specific agent versions via build arguments.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: This NixOS module allows for the declarative management of Hermes configurations, documents, and systemd services. It prioritizes security through sops-nix integration for secrets handling and supports a hybrid model of both Nix-managed and interactive CLI skills.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: Targeted at production environments, this tool configures the Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service on Ubuntu and Debian. It is optimized for headless operation, enabling the autonomous execution of recurring AI cron jobs and integration with Nous Portal.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: HermesHQ acts as a Docker-first control plane for orchestrating multiple Hermes instances with distinct identities and workspaces. It features hierarchy-aware delegation between agents and provides enterprise-grade MCP access for external AI client integrations.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: This Docker Compose stack integrates Hermes with a ttyd web terminal for browser-based CLI access. It is designed to be deployed as a Git Repository stack directly within Portainer, utilizing GitHub Actions for automated image builds.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration layer that manages multi-agent workflows across CrewAI, LangGraph, and AutoGen. It features a zero-dependency SQLite stack and the Aegis review system to enforce quality gates on dispatched tasks.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A TUI and web-based control surface designed for monitoring multiple coding agents like Hermes and Claude Code. It enables parallel execution across git worktrees using Docker, Podman, or Apple Containers for secure sandboxing.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A control-plane template that scales Hermes deployments from single VPS agents to orchestrated specialist teams. It utilizes task bus patterns to facilitate structured delegation between orchestrators and specialists.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A supervision interface for Hermes agents featuring a Kanban board for tracking autonomous task status. It provides live streaming of agent reasoning and requires human-in-the-loop verification for all proposed completions.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous agent swarms with durable memory and a visual protocol builder for designing workflows. It supports over 23 LLM providers, including local Ollama and Hermes.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A level-based architecture for scaling Hermes agents into automated teams with built-in skills for VPS provisioning and security auditing. It employs a task bus pattern to manage handoffs between orchestrators and specialists.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A coordinated system of 17 specialized agents spanning six functional domains, including research and infrastructure. It automates task routing through predefined pipelines while enforcing mandatory security and quality gates.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents using MCP and ACP protocols. It features a real-time Web UI to monitor agent dialogues and Kanban-based task lifecycles.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses automated outer-loop search to refine agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations via Hermes to track and improve performance frontiers.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing the competition via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via configurable timeouts and character limits.
entries.MorvaniLabs/cordn8: A local-first coordination layer that uses an append-only Markdown channel to create git-visible audit trails. It offers a universal adapter for various LLMs and three distinct autonomy modes: MANUAL, COPILOT, and AUTOPILOT.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed code knowledge graph that optimizes agent performance by reducing tool calls by 62% and costs by 25%. It integrates via MCP server configuration to provide efficient, Node.js-free indexing for Hermes Agent.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A high-performance Rust-based TUI for monitoring token consumption across various AI coding agents. It provides a centralized dashboard to track usage and costs for Hermes, Claude Code, and other LLM tools.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer designed to debug agent behavior by inspecting system prompts, tool calls, and streaming responses. It features structured diffs for comparing requests and exports sessions to portable HTML files.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates the full application lifecycle from requirements to production. It equips Hermes Agent with 6 specialized roles and 23 autonomous skills, including automated security scanning and issue triage.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A customization toolkit for the Hermes terminal UI that allows users to modify ASCII banners and spinner animations. Themes are easily shared and configured via YAML files that can inherit from the default skin.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A native port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills to the Claude Code Channel. It eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes while adding MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser that provides a supervisory UI for monitoring autonomous agents. It integrates with MCP for harness control and maintains durable state through annotated checkpoints and named sessions.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents with per-folder configurations. It allows users to seamlessly switch between default and project-local memories, tools, and instructions.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for research, finance, and devops with automated cross-platform installation.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that launches Hermes Agent using Docker, LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It provides a zero-cost environment featuring 29 community plugins for memory and quality validation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A static linter that performs deterministic, zero-LLM quality gating for system prompts and tool descriptions. It uses AST heuristics and regex to detect structural failure modes across YAML, JSON, and .prompt files.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility that transfers personas, memories, and workspace files from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations to Hermes YAML format and handles the transfer of system-level credentials.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built with Tauri 2 that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI. It serves as an all-in-one hub for managing multiple agent CLIs across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: A local cowork application that provides a GUI for Hermes Agent and over 13 other CLI agents. It features a built-in engine for generating editable Office documents and supports 24/7 unattended automation via Cron.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight web interface featuring a three-panel layout that maintains full parity with the Hermes CLI. It offers a no-build setup using Python and vanilla JavaScript, including an integrated workspace file browser with inline previews.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A desktop companion app that simplifies the installation and configuration of local or remote Hermes Agent backends. It integrates 14 specialized toolsets, 16 messaging gateways, and a unique 3D visual interface.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: A comprehensive web dashboard focused on session management and multi-platform configuration for services like Telegram, Discord, and Slack. It includes detailed usage analytics for token tracking, cost estimation, and model distribution.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace that integrates chat, terminal, and memory editing with zero-fork compatibility for vanilla installations. It introduces Swarm Mode for orchestrating multiple persistent, role-based autonomous agents.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A macOS-specific workspace that connects directly to Hermes hosts via native SSH and aliases. It provides native management for remote sessions, Kanban boards, and multi-agent workflows through selectable profiles.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted web gateway for managing multiple Hermes profiles with a real-time chat interface and tool-call cards. It provides comprehensive system metrics and token analytics to track costs and platform usage.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A native macOS session browser and 'agent cockpit' designed for monitoring active iTerm2 sessions. It offers local-only indexing of AI agent histories without telemetry or remote logging.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: A macOS interface specifically designed for Hermes Agent instances running on Orgo cloud VMs and SSH hosts. It features one-click automated installation and integrated WebRTC voice mode via OpenAI Realtime.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA designed as a Telegram Mini App with a terminal-style chat and slash command support. It allows users to spawn background agents and manage scheduled cron jobs from a mobile interface.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri, TypeScript, and Rust, tailored for the Chinese market. It includes a production-grade Rust proxy for secure REST and SSE communication and manages core agent updates.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A glassmorphic web interface consisting of a single-file React 18 application and a lightweight Python proxy. It provides real-time log streaming, a file browser, and management tools for MCP skills and cron jobs.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows portable GUI that requires no admin rights or Docker. It bundles over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and includes a dynamic tool maker for creating API wrappers.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A process monitoring dashboard focused on session activity, gateway status, and cost tracking. It features a read-only configuration viewer and full conversation history inspection using FTS5 search.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A self-hosted workspace featuring a chat-first interface with tool approval cards and real-time SSE streaming. It includes an integrated marketplace for discovering MCP servers and isolated profile management for separate API keys.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A desktop client that orchestrates 20 specialized AI agents through a Project Manager system. It features a visual Skill Store with over 50 one-click installable tools and native workspace management.
